productDisplayName: Levis Kids Boy's Dean White Black Teens Kidswear
description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with print on right chest extending to the sleeves, printed branding on left sleeve, "Levi's" appliquéd in a small red placket below the back neck and has a red soft padding on the inner neck to soak sweatFittingRegular46 cmWash care Machine wash separately in cold water, colour likely to bleed Use mild detergent Can dry clean Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Dry flat inside out in shade Iron at medium setting only Iron on reverse Wash before wearing Get ready to take your little boy on the style trip of his life with this white and red tee from Levi's. Team this with denim shorts and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with his small buddies, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
